After retrieval-rescue lifted cat-24/409 to 8/10, the 20-row 008 PASS sample was checked against the guarded change. The rescue layer is opt-in and only runs under SPECKIT_RERANK_LAYER=true or SPECKIT_TRIGGER_LANE_BOOST=true. Verification under SPECKIT_RERANK_LAYER=true passed: npm run typecheck; mcp_server/tests/retrieval-rescue.vitest.ts (3 tests); retrieval/scoring regression slice unit-rrf-fusion, query-surrogates, stage2b-enrichment-extended, adaptive-ranking-e2e (111 tests). No regression was observed in the sampled PASS surface; preservation = 20/20.
